summary: Iter 39 — Validated Phase 1 (#17 Feed EXEMPLO badge + #19 Onboarding dynamic tipoPeca) and Phase 2 minimal (Stúdio→Studio in header). All criteria pass on backend (3/3 pytest) and frontend (Feed badge × 4, onboarding palette→shape/text mapping across geodo/pastel/luxo, no 'Stúdio' anywhere, all key routes smoke-OK).
critical_code_review_comments: GenerationStep.jsx regex /minimalista|pastel/ on tipo string is fine but couples shape decision to PT text. If PALETTE_TIPO_PECA is ever translated/edited, shape will regress silently. Consider passing a `shape` prop alongside `tipoPeca` from OnboardingFlow (computed from palette.style), giving a single source of truth and decoupling text from layout.

OnboardingFlow.jsx PALETTE_TIPO_PECA includes a `minimalista` entry but no preset palette currently has style:'minimalista' (preset styles: geodo, floral, oceano, pastel, luxo). The map entry is dead until such a palette is added — low risk, just noting.

seed_content._backfill_exemplo_tag_on_feed pushes 'exemplo' at position 0 — works, but if a future seed adds new posts already tagged, the $nin guard correctly prevents duplicates. Idempotency verified by repeat GET (titles appear exactly once each).
Feed.jsx badges (pick + post) use post.id in data-testid which is fine; ensure backend never returns null id (currently uuid4 hex[:12], safe).
test_credentials: teste@lindart.app / Teste#2026 (used to trigger onboarding modal)
seed_data_creation: None — relied on existing seed_content lifespan
context_for_next_testing_agent: Items #17 and #19 plus the Stúdio→Studio header rename are fully GREEN. Onboarding requires authentication to open (guard at OnboardingFlow line 151). To re-trigger: login as teste@lindart.app, clear localStorage keys lindart.onboarding.v1.completed + lindart.tour.v1.seen + lindart-palette-store, then reload home. Palette→shape map verified: geodo/floral/luxo/oceano→circle, pastel/minimalista→square (regex on tipoPeca text).
rca of the issue: n/a — validation iteration, no bugs found.
